MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Roger Lyons, is present.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Rob Esmond and Marshall Moyer, are present.
Attorney, Umung Varma , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
